## FetchAndSaveHooks.onSuccess() method

Asynchronous callback executed when the [FetchAndSaveHooks.fetch()](./x-components.fetchandsavehooks.fetch.md) is performed successfully.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
onSuccess(context: Context, response: Response): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  context | Context | The [context](https://vuex.vuejs.org/guide/actions.html) of the actions, provided by Vuex. |
|  response | Response | The data returned by [FetchAndSaveHooks.fetch()](./x-components.fetchandsavehooks.fetch.md)<!-- -->. |
